emails.subject: ENA/Bear confirms and brokerage agreement
emails.body: ENA/Bear confirms and brokerage agreement Gil: Please include me on the distribution list for executed confirms and other agreements which to which ENA is a party. Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.body: FW: ENA/Bear confirms and brokerage agreement Gil: Please forward copies of the executed confirms for your ENA/Bear derivatives transaction. Thanks. Sara
